Table 1: Quantitative comparisons with state-of-the-art methods on the ETH/UCY dataset. Bold numbers indicate the best
performance. Underlined numbers denote the second-best results.
endpoint estimator adopts a similar structure with cross-
attention to capture trajectory-level context. We set diffu-
sion steps to K = 100 and apply DDIM sampling with
stride 20. The model is trained using Adam with learning
rate 0.001 and batch size 256. All experiments are conducted
on NVIDIA RTX 5090 GPUs and Intel Xeon 8481C CPUs.
Quanitative Evaluation
